positive: Minimalist abstract line art featuring a leaping fox surrounded by stylized constellations and abstract foliage. The fox should be drawn with elegant, sweeping lines, embodying dynamic motion. The style should resemble modern Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints combined with geometric celestial map elements. Composition must be centrally arranged, forming a strong, continuous silhouette against a deep navy or midnight blue background. Use a limited, contrasting color palette: vibrant gold leaf accents, off-white linework, and deep indigo shadows. High contrast, suitable for screen printing, perfect for repeating apparel pattern elements. Crisp vector quality.
